title: IR Lexicon — coined-term lexicon for modern foreign-affairs discourse
public_claim: A coined-term lexicon for modern foreign-affairs discourse.
distinctive_mechanism: It moves 400 raw coinages through a lacuna atlas, adoptability shortlist, 20-term canon, 10 mini-theories, 16-dimension adoption scoring, collision-risk flags, and a 25-rule propagation doctrine. Terms such as Credibility Underwriting Gap, Compellence Overdraft, Ambiguity Rent, Sanction Saturation, Standards Entrenchment, Compliance Chokepoints, and Doctrine Lock-In are treated as analytic instruments rather than slogans.
